query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS homeownerProfiles (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  address VARCHAR(500),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zip VARCHAR(20),
  propertyType ENUM('single_family', 'condo', 'townhouse', 'multi_family', 'other') DEFAULT 'single_family',
  sqft INT,
  yearBuilt INT,
  photoUrl TEXT,
  bio TEXT,
  setupComplete TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  address VARCHAR(500),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zip VARCHAR(20),

  sqft INT,
  yearBuilt INT,
  photoUrl TEXT,
  bio TEXT,
  setupComplete TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

);
